author: anon-59ff128d
content: The confirm loop iterates over changes and prompts per-change, but ConfirmAction::No just continues the inner loop without filtering. The output.text still contains ALL changes. The fix: track which changes were accepted, then if not all accepted, re-apply only the accepted changes by re-running the engine with line-range filtering, or skip the file entirely if no changes accepted. Simpler approach: switch to file-level confirm since the engine produces a single text output, not per-change outputs. Will change the prompt to ask about the whole file and document this is file-level granularity.
